name: mcp-sales-agent
description: MCP-native sales intelligence framework. Orchestrate CRM, call recorders, mailbox, and calendar through a unified Model Context Protocol layer.

tools.name: analyze_call
tools.description: Ingest a sales call recording and extract sentiment, objections, talk ratios, and stage inference.

tools.name: update_pipeline
tools.description: Move a deal to a new stage in the CRM pipeline.

tools.name: draft_followup
tools.description: Generate a post-call follow-up email from conversation content.

tools.name: generate_brief
tools.description: Surface last call summary, open commitments, recurring objections, and winning patterns.

tools.name: score_rep
tools.description: Get per-position scorecards with talk-time ratios and objection-resolution rates.

tools.name: get_benchmarks
tools.description: Get industry benchmark data for win rate, show rate, and cycle length.
